title: Bull Power applies Atk Hit SPD and AL plus two while equipped

plan.title: Bull Power applies Atk Hit SPD and AL plus two while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Bull Power to a modifier-zero primary creature, verify the printed SPD and AL bonuses, then run a battle for Hit and Atk.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so Hit and Atk bonuses come only from Bull Power.

steps: Player 1 plays Bull Power and equips it to their primary creature.
Read equipped creature effective SPD and AL.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the resolved hit roll modifier and damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +2 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm all four bonuses apply only while Bull Power remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses effective stat reads for SPD/AL and battle output for Hit/Atk.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Bull Power equipped stat suite.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
